_comment: Golden set for the Tier-A linkbase oracle (10_ingestion/14__fetch_oracle_statements.py). Deliberately tailed: GICS-sector anchors across fiscal-year ends to validate parser correctness, plus a tail where Class-A (wrong/missing-tag) bugs actually live. Edit this file (no code change) to grow/shrink Tier-A coverage. Each entry pulls the last n_10k 10-K(s) and n_10q 10-Q(s); FYE labels are approximate — the notebook confirms the real period_end. Tickers use SEC company_tickers.json symbology (e.g. BRK-B); the Tier-A join to main.financials.financials is by ticker+period_end, so a symbol the app stores differently simply yields no Tier-A rows (it never errors).
_note_combined_filers: COMBINED_FILERS from 00_config/01__tickers.py (e.g. SKT) are unioned in dynamically by the notebook — do NOT list them here.
_validate_the_validator: Tier A stays golden-set-only until its false-positive rate (measured via ORACLE_PARSE_FAIL count + manual review) drops below the agreed threshold. Do not scale Tier A to the universe until then.

tickers._tail: financial conglomerate — non-standard statements (SEC symbol BRK-B)
